# Instance chart {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(colorblindr)
library(downlit)
# fonts ----
library(extrafont)
library(sysfonts)
source("_common.R")
# use font
showtext::showtext_auto()
# set theme
ggplot2::theme_set(theme_ggp2g(
    base_size = 12))
```

```{r}
#| label: status
#| results: "asis"
#| echo: false
# status ----
# polish, dev, draft, complete
status("complete")
```


:::: {.callout-note collapse="false" icon=false}
## Graph info
::: {style="font-size: 1.25em; color: #007bff;"}
**Should I use this graph?**
:::

<br>

```{r}
#| label: full_code_display
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| out-height: '60%'
#| out-width: '60%'
#| fig-align: right
library(palmerpenguins) 
library(ggplot2movies)
library(ggplot2)
library(babynames)
beatles <- c("John", "Paul", "George", "Ringo")
beatle_bby_nms <- babynames::babynames |> 
  dplyr::filter(year > 1900 & name %in% beatles & n > 0) 
labs_inst_beatles <- labs(
  title = "Beatles name appearances over time", 
  subtitle = "Appearances of John, Paul, George and Ringo since 1900",
  x = "Year", y = "Name")
ggp2_inst_beatles <- ggplot(data = beatle_bby_nms, 
    mapping = aes(x = year, y = name, color = name)) + 
  geom_point(shape = 124, size = 5, show.legend = FALSE)
ggp2_inst_beatles + 
  labs_inst_beatles
```

::: {style="font-size: 1.10em; color: #007bff;"}
**This graph requires:**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #fa7b3c;"}
**`r emo::ji("check")` a categorical variable**      
:::

::: {style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #fa7b3c;"}
**`r emo::ji("check")` a numeric (count) variable**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #fa7b3c;"}
**`r emo::ji("check")` a numeric (date) variable**
:::

::::

## Description 

<!-- Description of graph aesthetics, appropriate use, similar graphs, etc.  -->

## Getting set up 

:::: {.panel-tabset}

### Packages

::: {style="font-size: 1.15em; color: #1e83c8;"}
**PACKAGES:**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.85em;"}
Install packages.
:::


::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}
#| label: pkg_code_inst
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
install.packages("babynames")
library(babynames)
library(ggplot2)
```
:::

### Data

::: {style="font-size: 1.15em; color: #1e83c8;"}
**DATA:**
:::

::: {.column-margin}
![](www/ssa.png){fig-align="center" width="30%" height="30%"}
:::

<!-- 
::: {.column-margin}
![Artwork by @allison_horst](www/lter_penguins.png){fig-align="right" width="30%" height="30%"}
![](www/538.png){fig-align="right" width="15%" height="15%"}
![](www/imdb.png){fig-align="right" width="20%" height="20%"}
:::
-->



::: {style="font-size: 0.85em;"}
<!-- Description of data -->
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}
#| label: data_code_inst
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
library(babynames)
beatles <- c("John", "Paul", "George", "Ringo")
beatle_bby_nms <- babynames::babynames |> 
  dplyr::filter(year > 1900 & name %in% beatles & n > 0) 
```
:::
::::

## The grammar

:::: {.panel-tabset}

### Code

::: {style="font-size: 1.15em; color: #1e83c8;"}
**CODE:**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.85em;"}

Create labels with `labs()`

Initialize the graph with `ggplot()` and provide `data`

:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}
#| label: code_graph_
#| eval: false
#| echo: true 
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| out-height: '100%'
#| out-width: '100%'
labs_inst_beatles <- labs(
  title = "Beatles name appearances over time", 
  subtitle = "Appearances of John, Paul, George and Ringo since 1900",
  x = "Year", y = "Name")
ggp2_inst_beatles <- ggplot(data = beatle_bby_nms, 
    mapping = aes(x = year, y = name, color = name)) + 
      geom_point(shape = 124, 
                 size = 7, 
                 show.legend = FALSE)
ggp2_inst_beatles + 
  labs_inst_beatles
```
:::

### Graph

:::: {.column-margin}
::: {style="font-size: 0.80em; color: #02577A;"}
<!-- More description of graph and code.  -->
:::
::::

::: {style="font-size: 1.15em; color: #1e83c8;"}
**GRAPH:**
:::

```{r}
#| label: create_graph_
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| out-height: '100%'
#| out-width: '100%'
labs_inst_beatles <- labs(
  title = "Beatles name appearances over time",
  subtitle = "Appearances of John, Paul, George and Ringo since 1900",
  x = "Year",
  y = "Name"
)
ggp2_inst_beatles <- ggplot(data = beatle_bby_nms,
    mapping = aes(x = year, y = name, color = name)) +
      geom_point(shape = 124, 
                 size = 7, 
                 show.legend = FALSE)
ggp2_inst_beatles +
  labs_inst_beatles
```

::::

## More info

:::: {.panel-tabset}

### Color

:::: {.column-margin}
::: {style="font-size: 0.80em; color: #02577A;"}
Info 
:::
::::

::: {style="font-size: 1.15em; color: #1e83c8;"}
**COLOR:**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.85em;"}

:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}
#| label: more_info_color
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| out-height: '100%'
#| out-width: '100%'
bbynms_ngt_55k <- babynames::babynames |> 
  dplyr::filter(n > 50000) 

min_ngt_55k_nms <- min(bbynms_ngt_55k$year, na.rm = TRUE)
max_ngt_55k_nms <- max(bbynms_ngt_55k$year, na.rm = TRUE)

labs_inst_ngt_55k <- labs(
  title = "Popular Baby Names", 
  subtitle = paste(
    "Name appearances over 50K times between ", 
    min_ngt_55k_nms, 
    " and ", 
    max_ngt_55k_nms),
  x = "Year",
  y = "Name")

ggp2_inst_ngt_55k <- ggplot(data = bbynms_ngt_55k, 
    mapping = aes(x = year, y = name, color = sex)) +
      geom_point(shape = "|", # 124
                 size = 3.2) + 
  xlim(c(min_ngt_55k_nms, max_ngt_55k_nms))

ggp2_inst_ngt_55k + 
  labs_inst_ngt_55k + 
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```

:::

### Facets 

::: {style="font-size: 1.15em; color: #1e83c8;"}
**FACETS:**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.85em;"}

:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}
#| label: bby_nms_fct
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| out-height: '100%'
#| out-width: '100%'
bby_nms_fct <- babynames::babynames |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    # proportion range 
    prop_range = ggplot2::cut_interval(x = prop, length = 0.01),
    prop_range = stringr::str_replace_all(prop_range, "\\[", "("),
    prop_range = stringr::str_replace_all(prop_range, "\\]", ")"),
    prop_range = stringr::str_replace_all(prop_range, ",", " - "),
    prop_range = factor(prop_range, 
      labels = c("(0.07 - 0.08)", "(0.02 - 0.03)", 
                  "(0.01 - 0.02)", "(0 - 0.01)", 
                  "(0.08 - 0.09)", "(0.05 - 0.06)",
                  "(0.04 - 0.05)", "(0.06 - 0.07)", 
                  "(0.03 - 0.04)"), ordered = TRUE),
    # year range 
    year_range = ggplot2::cut_width(year, width = 10),
    year_range = stringr::str_replace_all(year_range, "\\[", "("),
    year_range = stringr::str_replace_all(year_range, "\\]", ")"),
    decade = stringr::str_replace_all(year_range, ",", " - "),
    decade = factor(decade, 
      labels = c(
        "(1875 - 1885)", "(1885 - 1895)", "(1895 - 1905)", 
        "(1905 - 1915)", "(1915 - 1925)", "(1925 - 1935)", 
        "(1935 - 1945)", "(1945 - 1955)", "(1955 - 1965)", 
        "(1965 - 1975)", "(1975 - 1985)", "(1985 - 1995)", 
        "(1995 - 2005)", "(2005 - 2015)", "(2015 - 2025)"), 
      ordered = TRUE)) |> 
    dplyr::select(-year_range)
dplyr::glimpse(bby_nms_fct)
```
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}
#| label: bby_nms_facet
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
bby_nms_fct |> 
  dplyr::filter(year >= 1875 & year <= 1935 & prop > 0.05) |>
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = year, y = name, color = name, group = prop_range)) +
      geom_point(shape = "|", # 124
                 size = 3, 
        show.legend = FALSE) + 
  facet_wrap(decade ~ prop_range, ncol = 4)
```
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}

```
:::

::: {style="font-size: 0.75em;"}
```{r}
#| label: baby_name_trends
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
baby_name_trends <- function(start_year, end_year, proportion) {
  bby_nms_fct <- babynames::babynames |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    # proportion range 
    prop_range = ggplot2::cut_interval(x = prop, length = 0.01),
    prop_range = stringr::str_replace_all(prop_range, "\\[", "("),
    prop_range = stringr::str_replace_all(prop_range, "\\]", ")"),
    prop_range = stringr::str_replace_all(prop_range, ",", " - "),
    prop_range = factor(prop_range, 
      labels = c("(0.07 - 0.08)", "(0.02 - 0.03)", 
                  "(0.01 - 0.02)", "(0 - 0.01)", 
                  "(0.08 - 0.09)", "(0.05 - 0.06)",
                  "(0.04 - 0.05)", "(0.06 - 0.07)", 
                  "(0.03 - 0.04)"), ordered = TRUE),
    # year range 
    year_range = ggplot2::cut_width(year, width = 10),
    year_range = stringr::str_replace_all(year_range, "\\[", "("),
    year_range = stringr::str_replace_all(year_range, "\\]", ")"),
    decade = stringr::str_replace_all(year_range, ",", " - "),
    decade = factor(decade, 
      labels = c(
        "(1875 - 1885)", "(1885 - 1895)", "(1895 - 1905)", 
        "(1905 - 1915)", "(1915 - 1925)", "(1925 - 1935)", 
        "(1935 - 1945)", "(1945 - 1955)", "(1955 - 1965)", 
        "(1965 - 1975)", "(1975 - 1985)", "(1985 - 1995)", 
        "(1995 - 2005)", "(2005 - 2015)", "(2015 - 2025)"), 
      ordered = TRUE)) |> 
    dplyr::select(-year_range)
  
    graph_data <- dplyr::filter(.data = bby_nms_fct, 
      year >= start_year & year <= end_year & prop > proportion)
    
    ggplot(data = graph_data, 
      mapping = aes(x = year, y = name, color = name, group = prop_range)) +
        geom_point(shape = "|", # 124
                   size = 3, 
          show.legend = FALSE) + 
    facet_wrap(decade ~ prop_range, ncol = 4) + 
      labs(title = "Baby name popularity by decade and proprotion",
        subtitle = paste0("From", start_year, " to ", end_year, ", proportion = ", proportion),
        x = "Name", y = "Year")
}
```
:::


::::
